ddls:
CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the study (e.g., ongoing, completed, suspended) */,
  "principal_investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the study */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the study was approved by the ethics committee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_principal_investigator_id FOREIGN KEY ("principal_investigator_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the group belongs to */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  "group_type" TEXT /* Type of the group (e.g., control, treatment) */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the group was enrolled in the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_groups_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the measurement belongs to */,
  "measurement_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement (e.g., demographic, clinical) */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the measurement (e.g., survey, lab test) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement value */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement the value belongs to */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group the value belongs to */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "sd" REAL /* Standard deviation of the measurement */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_values_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_values_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "p_values" (
  "p_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each p-value */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement the p-value belongs to */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value calculated for the measurement */,
  "comparison_group_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first group in the comparison */,
  "comparison_group_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second group in the comparison */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("p_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_p_values_comparison_group_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("comparison_group_id_2") REFERENCES groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_p_values_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_p_values_comparison_group_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("comparison_group_id_1") REFERENCES groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the researcher is involved in */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., PI, Co-PI, Research Assistant) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the researcher (e.g., university, hospital) */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researchers_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the publication belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal the publication was published in */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the publication was published */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_groups" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id", "group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_groups" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id", "group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researcher_publications" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "contribution" TEXT /* Contribution of the researcher to the publication (e.g., primary author, co-author) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id", "publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the study */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the study was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher, guest) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
